report.title: Panelin GPT — Full Session Advances Report
report.subtitle: API-Centric Migration + CRAZY DEVELOP v2.0

session_timeline.description: Deep audit of all 40+ files configuring the GPT live version
deliverables: GPT_LIVE_VERSION_AUDIT_REPORT.json — 47KB, 10 critical findings, complete 7-layer file inventory
GPT_API_CENTRIC_ARCHITECTURE_ANALYSIS.json — 32KB, architecture vision, gap analysis, cost/performance model
key_discoveries: 4 production API endpoints completely broken (catalog.json missing → CATALOG = {} → all return 404)
bromyros_pricing_master.json 100% identical to bromyros_pricing_gpt_optimized.json (142KB pure waste)
Autoportancia stored 3 times in 3 files with identical values
OpenAPI schema v2.2.0 had only 4 of 17 endpoints
Panelin v4 engine existed but was NOT deployed to production
18 KB files = 453K tokens (3.5x GPT-4o context window)

session_timeline.description: Generated catalog.json to unblock 4 broken quotation endpoints

files_created.purpose: Transforms bromyros pricing (96 products) → flat catalog dict (122 entries)
122-entry product catalog: 96 by raw SKU + 31 panel aliases (ISODEC_EPS_100mm format)

session_timeline.description: Single Docker container with wolf_api + panelin_v4 engine + KB data

files_created.purpose: Unified production image — app.py entrypoint, bundles all code + data

files_modified.change: Build context → repo root, Dockerfile.production, CATALOG_PATH env, expanded path triggers

session_timeline.impact: v4 engine routes (/api/quote, /api/validate, /api/sai-score) deployed to production

session_timeline.description: 5 new endpoints enabling GPT to be a pure API router

endpoints_added.purpose: Validate span vs thickness — ok/warning/blocked + alternatives
Technical specs: R-value, autoportancia, coef_termico, ancho_util
Slim product listing with tipo/familia filters
IVA rate, derivation policy, shipping defaults, phone format
Energy savings comparison between two panels with payback

session_timeline.impact: GPT no longer needs KB files for any technical data

session_timeline.description: Replaced 18 KB files (453K tokens) with 2 files (4.5K tokens) + updated OpenAPI schema

files_created.purpose: 26 product_id mappings, 15 endpoint routes, 8 param validators — ZERO data
Quotation process, PDF workflow, training guide, SOP commands, aleros rules — ZERO data

session_timeline.description: Archive old files, delete dead code, fix security
session_timeline.impact: Clean codebase, no secrets, no dead code

session_timeline.phase: CRAZY DEVELOP Step 1 — Smart Quote Engine

models: SmartQuoteRequest — product_id, length_m, width_m, quantity, include_accessories, include_fixings, include_sealant, discount_percent, include_tax, installation_type
SmartQuoteResponse — quote_id, line_items[], subtotal, volume/manual discounts, waste_factor, waste_cost, iva, total, estimated_install_hours, valid_until, notes
LineItem — product_id, name, category, quantity, unit, unit_price, subtotal

features: Full BOM: panels + fixings (16/m²) + sealant (1 tube/10m²) + flashings (perimeter-based, thickness-matched)
Real catalog prices from BROMYROS (IVA 22% included)
Smart product matching: finds best fixing/sealant/flashing by panel family + thickness

session_timeline.test_result: IAGRO30 10×5m → 6 line items (panel + fixing + silicone + butilo + gotero frontal + gotero lateral) = USD 2,972.40 ✅

session_timeline.phase: CRAZY DEVELOP Step 2 — Panel Selector AI

features: Filters by: use_case (techo/pared/camara_frigorifica), thermal_requirement (R-value), budget_max, area_m2
Builds 30 panel candidates from BMC KB + catalog with full specs
Scoring: R-value per USD with bonuses — PIR +15% (fire resistance), autoportancia >7m +10%
Returns top 3 ranked recommendations with comparison table
Each recommendation includes: advantages[], considerations[], score_breakdown
Estimates R-value from thickness/material when not in KB
schemas: PanelRecommendation — rank, product_id, name, specs, price, total_cost, score, advantages[], considerations[]

test_results: techo R≥2.5 budget 10K 100m² → #1 ISODEC EPS 250mm (score 12.57), #2 ISODEC PIR 120mm (11.12), #3 ISODEC EPS 200mm (11.02) ✅
pared budget 5K 80m² → #1 ISOPANEL EPS 200mm, #2 ISOPANEL EPS 150mm, #3 ISOPANEL EPS 100mm ✅

legacy_quotation.status: FIXED — were broken, now backed by 122-entry catalog

technical_validation.status: NEW — enable GPT as pure API router

catalog_and_rules.status: NEW — eliminate need for KB data files

bom_capability.before: GPT reads 4 files + does manual math

panel_recommendation.before: GPT guesses from scattered KB data

new_files_created.purpose: GPT KB: API routing index (2.2K tokens)
Smart Quote Engine: BOM + pricing pipeline

files_modified.change: +400 lines (5 endpoints + router registration + startup injection)

files_deleted: wolf_api/sheets_routes.py (dead code, syntax errors, never imported)

to_go_live: 1. Merge branch to main → triggers CI/CD → deploys unified container to Cloud Run
3. Update GPT Builder: remove 18 old KB files, upload panelin_api_index.json + panelin_operations.md
4. Paste gpt_actions_openapi_schema.json v4.0.0 into GPT Actions panel
5. Update GPT system instructions to API-first strategy
crazy_develop_next_features: Step 3: Batch quotation endpoint (multiple products/areas in one call)
Step 5: Project cost estimator (panels + structure + labor)
Step 6: WhatsApp webhook integration for automated quotations
